prompt: An overhead, high-angle shot of a young woman with long, wavy blonde hair and soft curtain bangs sitting on a beige carpeted floor. She is wearing clear-framed, round prescription glasses and looking directly up at the camera with a subtle, gentle smile. Her outfit consists of a simple white short-sleeved t-shirt with delicate lace trim, loose-fitting baggy denim shorts, and knee-high dark brown leather boots. The lighting is soft and natural, creating a casual, candid, and nostalgic 90s-inspired aesthetic.
